title: SubtaskBrief
description: Self-contained unit of work emitted by DECOMPOSE (REQ-D2). Bounded context: the only thing a maker receives.

id.description: stable unit id; worktree path derives from this (ADR-0013)

writes_files.description: files the unit may write; used for file-overlap co-dispatch (NFR-PERF-2) and scope-creep detection

context_slices.description: exact code slices cut ONCE by the orchestrator; byte-exact, never compressed (REQ-E3)

consumes.description: symbols this unit depends on (must resolve to an upstream produces — lint_plan, REQ-D3)

expected_behavior.description: structured/asserted behavior the RED test must target (REQ-T1 cause match)

logical_deps.description: unit ids this unit is logically coupled to even without a structural edge (REQ-D1)

verify_cmd.description: command the harness runs to verify the unit (e.g. pytest path::test)

roles.description: assigned makers; harness enforces test_author != impl_author (REQ-T2)
